landing.heroDescription: Connect with our collaborative ecosystem of local impact. Created from and for New York.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to create impact
landing.featuresDescription: A comprehensive platform to manage social projects, connect with experts, and accelerate your growth.
landing.rolesDescription: Whether you're an entrepreneur, mentor, facilitator, or local development idea proponent, there's a place for you in our community.
landing.ctaDescription: Join our community of social entrepreneurs and transform your vision into reality.

about.heroDescription: We integrate training, collaboration, and project development in a single space. ImpactLAB is where social impact ideas take shape, strengthen, and become reality.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: Empower the social innovation ecosystem in Latin America by connecting talent, resources, and knowledge to transform ideas into real-impact projects.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: Be the global reference platform for collaborative creation of solutions that address the most urgent social challenges, driving sustainable and inclusive development.

objectives.title: Objectives
objectives.description: Facilitate training processes, project design, and collaborative prototyping that enable social entrepreneurs to take their ideas from concept to implementation.

model.title: Our Model
model.subtitle: Two interconnected laboratories covering the entire social innovation cycle

learningLab.title: Learning-Lab
learningLab.subtitle: Training and capacity building
learningLab.description: A space dedicated to the continuous training of social entrepreneurs through structured courses, personalized mentoring, and high-quality educational resources.

coLab.title: Co-Lab
coLab.subtitle: Collaboration and prototyping
coLab.description: A co-creation laboratory where ideas become projects through collaborative methodologies, multidisciplinary teams, and agile prototyping processes.

audiences.title: Who We Serve
audiences.subtitle: We connect all actors in the social innovation ecosystem

benefits.title: What Talent Gains
benefits.subtitle: Every person who participates in ImpactLAB develops skills, connections, and tangible results

items.title: Networking
items.desc: Contact network with entrepreneurs, mentors, and investors in the social ecosystem

items.title: Certifications
items.desc: Recognized accreditations that validate competencies in social innovation

items.title: Real Experience
items.desc: Direct participation in projects with measurable and documented social impact

items.title: Growth
items.desc: Continuous professional development with personalized mentoring and follow-up

items.title: Innovation
items.desc: Access to cutting-edge methodologies in social project design

items.title: Visibility
items.desc: Project portfolio and public profile within the GA4SI ecosystem

items.title: Mentoring
items.desc: Guidance from experts with proven track record in social impact

items.title: Tools
items.desc: Access to templates, frameworks, and resources to accelerate projects

methodology.title: Our Methodology
methodology.subtitle: A structured process that guides each project from idea to impact

steps.title: Diagnosis
steps.desc: Context analysis and definition of the social problem to solve

steps.title: Design
steps.desc: Co-creation of the solution with design thinking methodologies

steps.title: Prototyping
steps.desc: MVP development and proof of concept with real users

steps.title: Validation
steps.desc: Results measurement and iteration based on impact data

steps.title: Scaling
steps.desc: Growth strategy and search for strategic alliances

history.title: Our Journey
history.subtitle: From academic concept to global impact platform

events.title: The Origin: Idea & Incubation at MIT Sloan
events.desc: Concept development at the Stavros Niarchos Library and creation of the operational model within the innovation ecosystem of the Sloan School of Management (MIT), merging urban vision with academic rigor.

events.title: The Launch: Epicenter in New York
events.desc: Establishment of ImpactLab in NYC as the central operations hub, consolidating the space where local talent connects with world-class social innovation projects.

events.title: The Structure: Dual Labs & ARNI Accreditation
events.desc: Creation of the Learning Lab and CoLab to solve real urban challenges. Implementation of certified and ARNI-accredited impact methodology, ensuring excellence standards in professional volunteering.

events.title: The Present: Impact Cycle Consolidation
events.desc: Active execution of the Activate → Structure → Apply → Generate Impact cycle. Currently in the real-time results validation phase, maximizing value delivered to our partner organizations.

events.title: The Immediate Future: Strategic Global Expansion
events.desc: Scaling the model as a replicable solution, connecting academic institutions and impact organizations across multiple cities, exporting innovation born in New York to the rest of the world.
